evals.name: agents-package-inference
evals.description: Minimal prompt with no package hint — tests that the skill correctly infers agents for a status-type component
evals.expected_output:
## Done: EvalStatusPill

**Package:** agents
**Files created:**
- packages/agents/src/EvalStatusPill.tsx
- packages/agents/src/index.ts (updated)
- apps/storybook/src/stories/EvalStatusPill.stories.tsx
- docs/components/EvalStatusPill.md
**ARIA pattern:** role="status" + aria-live="polite"
**MCP states:** idle, running, done, error (or equivalent status values)
**Build + lint:** passing
**Tests:** passing
**Figma:** skipped
evals.teardown: git restore packages/agents/src/index.ts && rm -f packages/agents/src/EvalStatusPill.tsx apps/storybook/src/stories/EvalStatusPill.stories.tsx docs/components/EvalStatusPill.md
assertions: Package correctly inferred as agents (not core)
Source file created at packages/agents/src/EvalStatusPill.tsx
Source exports EvalStatusPill as named export (not default)
Source exports EvalStatusPillProps interface
Source includes role="status" and aria-live="polite" ARIA attributes
Source uses only Chakra semantic tokens — no hardcoded hex values
Source does NOT have a default React import
packages/agents/src/index.ts exports EvalStatusPill and EvalStatusPillProps
Story file created at apps/storybook/src/stories/EvalStatusPill.stories.tsx
Story does NOT have a default React import
Story title is 'Agents/EvalStatusPill'
Spec doc created at docs/components/EvalStatusPill.md
Spec doc frontmatter includes mcp-states field
npm run build passes
ESLint reports no errors in the scaffolded source and story files (pre-existing violations in other files are acceptable)

evals.name: core-package-explicit
evals.description: Explicit 'to core' in prompt — tests that the skill respects the stated package and applies the core-specific ARIA pattern (required aria-label prop)
evals.prompt: Add an EvalIconButton component to core
evals.expected_output:
## Done: EvalIconButton

**Package:** core
**Files created:**
- packages/core/src/EvalIconButton.tsx
- packages/core/src/index.ts (updated)
- apps/storybook/src/stories/EvalIconButton.stories.tsx
- docs/components/EvalIconButton.md
**ARIA pattern:** none — aria-label is a required prop (SC 4.1.2)
**MCP states:** n/a
**Build + lint:** passing
**Tests:** passing
**Figma:** skipped
evals.teardown: git restore packages/core/src/index.ts && rm -f packages/core/src/EvalIconButton.tsx apps/storybook/src/stories/EvalIconButton.stories.tsx docs/components/EvalIconButton.md
assertions: Source file created at packages/core/src/EvalIconButton.tsx
EvalIconButtonProps interface includes aria-label as a required prop
Source exports EvalIconButton as named export (not default)
Source exports EvalIconButtonProps interface
Source uses only Chakra semantic tokens — no hardcoded hex values
Source does NOT have a default React import
packages/core/src/index.ts exports EvalIconButton and EvalIconButtonProps
Story file created at apps/storybook/src/stories/EvalIconButton.stories.tsx
Story does NOT have a default React import
Story title is 'Core/EvalIconButton'
Spec doc created at docs/components/EvalIconButton.md
Spec doc includes accessibility section referencing aria-label requirement
npm run build passes
ESLint reports no errors in the scaffolded source and story files (pre-existing violations in other files are acceptable)

evals.name: already-exists-guard
evals.description: Source file pre-exists — tests that the skill refuses to overwrite and redirects to /update-component instead of scaffolding
evals.prompt: Add an EvalStatusPill component to agents
evals.expected_output:
## Already exists: EvalStatusPill

`packages/agents/src/EvalStatusPill.tsx` already exists.
Use `/update-component EvalStatusPill` to audit and update it instead.
evals.setup: echo 'export const EvalStatusPill = () => null; export type EvalStatusPillProps = Record<string, never>;' > packages/agents/src/EvalStatusPill.tsx
evals.teardown: rm -f packages/agents/src/EvalStatusPill.tsx && git restore packages/agents/src/index.ts 2>/dev/null || true
assertions: Skill did not overwrite packages/agents/src/EvalStatusPill.tsx
Skill reported that the component already exists
Skill suggested using /update-component EvalStatusPill
No story file was created at apps/storybook/src/stories/EvalStatusPill.stories.tsx
No spec doc was created at docs/components/EvalStatusPill.md
packages/agents/src/index.ts was not modified
